accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text including the Fed. Reg. citation and dates.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the CRA process description is accurate real-world context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as disapproving the DOE student loan waiver rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule would have no force or effect upon enactment.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in the bill.

effective_dates.why: Notes no separate effective date beyond the resolution itself.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the targeted rule, its components, the GAO opinion, and the operative nullification.

correct_entities.why: DOE, GAO, and program names all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 87 Fed. Reg. 61512, Oct. 12, 2022, March 17, 2023 all correctly stated.
